2026-04-21ISEDBusiness Development Bank of Canada ActReappointment of a director of the Board of Directors of the Business Development Bank of CanadaApproval of the reappointment by the Minister of Industry of Tania Clarke of Pierrefonds, Quebec, as a director of the Board of Directors of the Business Development Bank of Canada, to hold office during pleasure for a term of four years.N/A
act: Business Development Bank of Canada Act
subject: Reappointment of a director of the Board of Directors of the Business Development Bank of Canada
precis: Approval of the reappointment by the Minister of Industry of Tania Clarke of Pierrefonds, Quebec, as a director of the Board of Directors of the Business Development Bank of Canada, to hold office during pleasure for a term of four years.
